summary: Replaced the remaining sysdolphin/baselib/state.s assembly object with a matched C implementation of HSD render-state handling. The PR added state.c/state.h definitions for HSD channel defaults, material state, render-mode setup, cached GX state setters, and state invalidation dispatch, then switched obj_files.mk to build state.c. Supporting changes corrected GXPixel prototypes to narrower u8/u32 types, updated mobj.c callers after HSD_SetMaterialColor/HSD_SetMaterialShininess signatures were simplified, and renamed several TEV invalidation asm labels from anonymous HSD_Tev_80362Cxx names to _HSD_StateInvalidate* names.

key_files.role: Deleted 981-line assembly implementation after matching it in C.
New 441-line C implementation for HSD state setup, cached GX state setters, material state, channel defaults, and invalidation dispatch.
Expanded state API with HSD_STATE_* mask macros, HSD_Chan struct, and matched function prototypes.
Adjusted GXPixel function signatures to u8/u32 argument types used by state.c and matching codegen.
Updated public prototypes for GXSetDstAlpha, GXSetDither, GXSetZCompLoc, GXSetZMode, GXSetAlphaUpdate, and GXSetColorUpdate.
Renamed TEV invalidation labels to semantic _HSD_StateInvalidate* names.
Added TEV setup/state prototypes and invalidate-function declarations needed by state.c.
Updated HSD_SetMaterialColor and HSD_SetMaterialShininess calls to match simplified state.h prototypes.
Switched the build from asm/sysdolphin/baselib/state.s.o to src/sysdolphin/baselib/state.c.o.

what_changed: Removed asm/sysdolphin/baselib/state.s and added src/sysdolphin/baselib/state.c as the built implementation.
Implemented HSD_SetupChannelMode in C, including specular-light setup, active light iteration, diffuse/alpha channel selection, and use of HSD_LObjGetLightMaskSpecular/Diffuse/Alpha.
Implemented HSD_SetupPEMode and render-mode setup paths, including default PE setup when no HSD_PEDesc is supplied and custom-PE support through HSD_SetupRenderModeWithCustomPE.
Factored repeated final-TEV initialization into static setupTevMode_last(), which creates a default HSD_TevDesc when HSD_StateGetNumTevStages() returns zero.

Implemented cached wrappers around GX state calls: HSD_StateSetLineWidth, HSD_StateSetCullMode, HSD_StateSetBlendMode, HSD_StateSetZMode, HSD_StateSetPointSize, HSD_StateSetAlphaCompare, HSD_StateSetColorUpdate, HSD_StateSetAlphaUpdate, HSD_StateSetDstAlpha, HSD_StateSetZCompLoc, and HSD_StateSetDither.

Added static cached state variables such as state_blend_type, state_src_factor, state_z_enable, state_alpha_comp0, state_color_update, state_enable_dst_alpha, state_before_tex, and state_dither to suppress redundant GX calls.

Converted the old assembly data table HSD_State_80405A38 into multiple HSD_Chan globals: HSD_State_80405A38, HSD_State_80405A38_30, HSD_State_80405A38_60, HSD_State_80405A38_90, HSD_State_80405A38_C0, and HSD_State_80405A38_F0.

Added HSD_STATE_* mask macros and an invalidate_funcs dispatch table mapping primitive, vertex-attribute, color-channel, TEV-stage, TEV-register, tex-coord-gen, and render-mode invalidation bits to functions.

Renamed asm TEV helpers HSD_Tev_80362CA0, HSD_Tev_80362CF8, HSD_Tev_80362D04, and HSD_Tev_80362D24 to _HSD_StateInvalidateColorChannel, _HSD_StateInvalidateTevStage, _HSD_StateInvalidateTevRegister, and _HSD_StateInvalidateTexCoordGen.
Changed GXPixel signatures from broad signed integer types to u8/u32 where the call sites and assembly behavior require byte-sized booleans or unsigned fields.
Simplified HSD_SetMaterialColor to take ambient/diffuse/specular colors and alpha only, and HSD_SetMaterialShininess to take shininess only; mobj.c call sites were updated accordingly.
smart_moves: Preserved the state.s data layout by splitting the contiguous HSD_State_80405A38 channel table into named HSD_Chan globals with suffixes matching original offsets, making the C representation searchable without losing address/offset evidence.
Used explicit GX_TRUE/GX_FALSE normalization before cached GX boolean calls, matching the assembly pattern that converted nonzero inputs to 0 or 1 before comparing/storing state bytes.
Matched the state cache behavior instead of blindly forwarding every setter to GX; each HSD_StateSet* wrapper compares against cached globals and only calls GX when the value changes.
Moved formerly anonymous TEV invalidation labels to semantic names so the state invalidation table can call meaningful symbols instead of address-derived HSD_Tev_80362Cxx names.
Adjusted low-level GXPixel prototypes to u8/u32, which helps callers generate the same byte truncation and unsigned argument behavior seen in the assembly.
Factored the shared 'ensure at least one TEV stage' logic into setupTevMode_last(), reducing duplication between HSD_SetupRenderMode and HSD_SetupRenderModeWithCustomPE while preserving behavior.
decomp_lessons: For state-manager code, matching often depends on reproducing both the external GX calls and the internal cached-state guards that skip redundant hardware writes.
When assembly stores booleans in sbss bytes, model cached globals as u8 and normalize incoming int flags to GX_TRUE/GX_FALSE before comparison.
Signature accuracy in lower-level library headers can be required for matching unrelated higher-level modules; here GXPixel u8/u32 prototypes support matched state.c calls.
Large assembly data blobs can often be recovered as typed structs plus multiple globals at known offsets; adding offset suffixes is acceptable when true semantic names are not yet known.
Invalidation tables become clearer and safer when mask constants are declared in headers and function-pointer targets have semantic names.

When a matched function signature becomes simpler than old speculative prototypes, update all callers immediately; mobj.c no longer passes HSD_Material* to HSD_SetMaterialColor or HSD_SetMaterialShininess.
naming_conventions: Use HSD_STATE_* uppercase macros for invalidate mask bits, including HSD_STATE_ALL, HSD_STATE_NONE, HSD_STATE_PRIMITIVE, HSD_STATE_VTX_ATTR, HSD_STATE_COLOR_CHANNEL, HSD_STATE_TEV_STAGE, HSD_STATE_TEV_REGISTER, HSD_STATE_TEX_COORD_GEN, and HSD_STATE_RENDER_MODE.
Use _HSD_StateInvalidate* for internal invalidation helpers, even when the code lives in or was formerly named from TEV assembly.
Retain address-derived names like HSD_State_80405A38 when the true semantic name is unknown.
For recovered pieces of a contiguous data table, suffix the base address-derived symbol with the original offset, as in HSD_State_80405A38_30, _60, _90, _C0, and _F0.
Use state_* static globals for cached render state fields, such as state_blend_type, state_z_enable, state_alpha_ref0, state_color_update, and state_dither.
The PR still contains one address-derived cache name, HSD_State_804D75BC, showing evidence was insufficient to name every cached field semantically.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Deleted the state.s object only after switching obj_files.mk to build the C object at the same position in TEXT_O_FILES.

Matched assembly boolean canonicalization with ternary-style conversion to GX_TRUE/GX_FALSE before passing to GXSetZMode, GXSetColorUpdate, GXSetAlphaUpdate, GXSetDstAlpha, GXSetZCompLoc, and GXSetDither.
Matched byte-backed cache fields by declaring them as u8, while retaining int for fields compared/stored as words.
Reproduced the invalidate dispatch table as an array of mask/function pairs terminated by HSD_STATE_NONE, mirroring the assembly loop over invalidate_funcs.
Recovered material state as a static struct containing ambient, diffuse, specular, alpha, and shininess, matching the old matstate bss block.
Used HSD_TevDesc stack setup in setupTevMode_last() with explicit fields such as flags, stage, coord, map, color, and u.tevop.tevmode to replace the stack stores in the assembly.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or reviews were present in the PR slice, so there is no recorded reviewer feedback to extract.
follow_up_queries: Look for later PRs that rename HSD_State_80405A38 or HSD_State_804D75BC to semantic names.
Search later history for C decompilation of asm/sysdolphin/baselib/tev.s invalidation helpers now named _HSD_StateInvalidateColorChannel and related functions.
Check subsequent GXPixel PRs for full C matches of GXSetColorUpdate, GXSetAlphaUpdate, GXSetZMode, GXSetZCompLoc, GXSetDither, and GXSetDstAlpha after the signature corrections.
Search for other modules that use HSD_STATE_* invalidation masks to verify consistency of state.h definitions.
